summary:
The superior rectal artery supplies the upper part of the anal canal above the pectinate line, while the inferior rectal artery supplies the lower part below it. The middle rectal artery does not have distinct or proven供应 to the anal canal and therefore should not be considered an independent supplier.  

Final Answer: \boxed{D}
